name: Purple Potato Chips
description: When you have fresh purple potatoes, it's only natural to turn them into delicious homemade potato chips.
instructions: Cut into 1/16-inch thick slices with a mandoline or a sharp knife.
Place cut potato slices in a large bowl.
Toss potatoes with olive oil and salt until well coated.
Arrange slices in a single layer on a rimmed baking sheet.
Bake at 450°F until chips are starting to brown on the edges, about 15 to 18 minutes.
Remove from oven and place on a wire rack to cool, about 20 minutes, before serving.
If chips are not crispy enough, return to oven to bake at 450°F for an additional 5 minutes.
